topics.title: DevOps Culture & Collaboration
topics.label: Foundation
topics.description: Explore the cultural principles of DevOps, including collaboration between development and operations, shared ownership, and feedback loops.
topics.goal: Explain why DevOps is as much culture as it is tooling.

topics.title: Infrastructure as Code
topics.label: Foundation
topics.description: Learn the principles of infrastructure as code, and how declarative definitions enable repeatable environment provisioning and version control.
topics.goal: Describe the benefits of managing infrastructure with code.

topics.title: Configuration Management
topics.label: Intermediate
topics.description: Understand how configuration management tools and patterns keep systems in the desired state, including idempotence and drift detection.
topics.goal: Apply configuration management concepts to cloud infrastructure.

topics.title: Observability & Monitoring
topics.label: Intermediate
topics.description: Cover the core pillars of observability—metrics, logs, and tracing—and how they support troubleshooting and reliability.
topics.goal: Use observability practices to monitor cloud applications and infrastructure.

topics.title: Incident Response & Reliability
topics.label: Advanced
topics.description: Learn incident response practices, post-incident reviews, service level objectives, and reliability engineering principles.
topics.goal: Implement a basic incident response workflow for production systems.

topics.title: Continuous Improvement
topics.label: Advanced
topics.description: Explore how continuous improvement drives DevOps maturity through automation, retrospectives, and incremental process improvement.
topics.goal: Use feedback to improve delivery and operational practices over time.

subjectTracks.title: DevOps Foundations
subjectTracks.description: Learn the culture, principles, and core practices that make DevOps effective.

subjectTracks.title: Observability & Reliability
subjectTracks.description: Build resilient systems with monitoring, incident response, and continuous improvement.
